parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id,
  t.number,
  t.created,
  COALESCE(d.subject, '') AS subject,
  SUBSTRING(te.body, 1, 3000) AS message
FROM ost_ticket t
JOIN ost_ticket__cdata d ON d.ticket_id = t.id
JOIN ost_thread_entry te ON te.thread_id = t.thread_id
WHERE
  t.status_id = 1
  AND t.created > NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND t.id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ticket_id
    FROM ost_thread_entry
    WHERE body LIKE '%[KI-Analyse]%'
    AND type = 'N'
  )
ORDER BY t.created DESC
LIMIT 20

meta.description: Liest offene Tickets der letzten 24h direkt aus der osTicket-MySQL-DB. Pro Ticket: Embedding → Qdrant-Ähnlichkeitssuche → Ollama-Analyse → interne Notiz via osTicket-API. Tickets mit vorhandener KI-Notiz werden übersprungen. Benötigt: MySQL-Credential 'osTicket DB', n8n-Variablen OSTICKET_HOST + OSTICKET_API_KEY, Qdrant-Collection 'osticket_solutions'.
